action.reasoning: Observation: the longer seen-specialist attempt did not improve eval; global score remains 0.01 and only Fetch is solved. Analysis: sparse PPO on the navigation/key tasks is still failing, while Fetch is near-perfect locally and gives the only measurable reward. With 20 iterations left but only ~6.1h, the best expected-value move is to exploit the one task family we can likely improve further: Fetch. A stronger Fetch specialist trained longer and routed only to Fetch can raise mean_reward directly, whereas more seen-task training has repeatedly yielded zero. Decision: train a longer dedicated Fetch specialist (1M timesteps) using the existing full-observation pipeline, then route Fetch to it and all other envs to the current fallback fullobs model, smoke-test locally, and submit eval.
action.command: mkdir -p local_eval_data && cp eval_config_local.json local_eval_data/eval_config.json && python train.py --envs MiniGrid-Fetch-8x8-N3-v0 --total_timesteps 1000000 --n_envs 8 --save_dir checkpoints/fetch_specialist_1m && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/router_fetch_1m --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
